arts.ttl: Arsenal receive EXCELLENT news on top target despite Barcelona interest
arts.sum: Barcelona have an interest in goalkeeper Joan Garcia, but Arsenal remain best-positioned to sign him, according to Spanish media. This is good news for Arsenal, as is the revelation that Espanyol will likely have to sell Garcia in the summer.

arts.ttl: Atletico Madrid eyeing summer move for Manchester City midfielder
arts.sum: It is no secret that Atletico Madrid are chasing the signing of a new defensive midfielder, and the club hopes to end their search during the summer. Diego Simeone currently has Pablo Barrios, Rodrigo De Paul, Koke Resurreccion and Conor Gallagher as first team options – and also Thomas Lemar, although he is not counted […] The post Atletico Madrid eyeing summer move for Manchester City midfielder appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Barcelona legend claims Lamine Yamal ‘would not be playing’ in his generation
arts.sum: A former member of the defensive ranks at La Liga giants Barcelona has this week revealed his take that current Blaugrana sensation Lamine Yamal would likely not have been a…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid furious with Barcelona and Atlético Madrid
arts.sum: Real Madrid are furious that LaLiga has scheduled their game against Villarreal on matchday 28 for 6:30 p.m. local time (12:30 p.m. ET) on Saturday, March 15, giving them what they feel is a considerable disadvantage in the title race in Spain. Due to LaLiga’s scheduling, Ancelotti’s team will head to Villarreal with only two days of rest after the grueling European match, and on top of that, they’ll play at 6:30 p.m.

arts.ttl: One Barcelona star is comfortably leading La Liga in assists & dribbles this season
arts.sum: A member of the attacking ranks at Barcelona is leading all players in the division when it comes to both assists, and successful dribbles this season. That’s according to statisticians…

arts.ttl: Barcelona transfer news: Lionel Messi 'getting closer' to sensational Camp Nou return
arts.sum: Barcelona are allegedly looking at a scenario where they can re-sign Inter Miami forward Lionel Messi later in 2025.

arts.ttl: Barcelona exploit FIFA loophole to sell Roque despite LaLiga threats
arts.sum: Barcelona have found a way to cash in on Vitor Roque despite LaLiga and the Spanish federation threatening to block the transfer. Barcelona exploit FIFA loophole to sell Roque despite LaLiga threats

arts.ttl: Barcelona exploring deal as Lionel Messi sets sights on shock Camp Nou return

arts.ttl: Yamal named in Barça squad for Atleti 1st leg
arts.sum: Szczesny; Kounde, Araujo, Cubarsí, Balde; De Jong, Pedri; Yamal, Olmo, Raphinha; Lewandowski Lamine Yamal has recovered in time from the foot injury he suffered in the weekend win over Las Palmas and has been named in the 22-man squad for Tuesday’s Copa del Rey semi-final first leg against Atlético Madrid.
